# PreConstructionMiami.net — Full Content Guide for AI Systems

> South Florida's premier marketplace for pre-construction condos. Access 200+ new developments across 24 neighborhoods from Brickell to West Palm Beach. Price range: $300K to $50M+.

## Site Overview

PreConstructionMiami.net is an informational technology platform that aggregates publicly available data about pre-construction real estate projects in South Florida. The site serves buyers, investors, and real estate professionals looking for new construction condos across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties.

### What We Cover
- 154+ active pre-construction condo developments
- 24 neighborhoods across three counties
- 78+ developer profiles with project portfolios
- 20+ in-depth market analysis articles
- Pricing from $300K studios to $50M+ penthouses
- Construction statuses: Pre-Launch, Pre-Construction, Under Construction, Near Completion

### Business Model
PreConstructionMiami.net is an informational and advertising platform. We are NOT a licensed real estate brokerage. We connect interested buyers with licensed local real estate professionals who can assist with transactions.

---

## Core Content Pages

### Homepage
- **URL:** https://preconstructionmiami.net/
- **Content:** Interactive 3D map of all developments, featured projects, neighborhood explorer, "How Pre-Construction Works" guide
- **Key data:** Total project count, neighborhood count, price range overview

### All Properties Listing
- **URL:** https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos
- **Content:** Searchable, filterable grid of all 154+ pre-construction projects
- **Filters:** Neighborhood, price range, construction status, building category, sort order

### About
- **URL:** https://preconstructionmiami.net/about
- **Content:** Company mission, what we do, why pre-construction, why Miami, data sourcing methodology

### Contact
- **URL:** https://preconstructionmiami.net/contact-us
- **Content:** Inquiry form, office location, business hours, what we help with

---

## Property Pages (154+ pages)

Each property page at `/properties/[slug]` contains:
- Building name, address, neighborhood, developer
- Construction status and estimated completion date
- Price range (min/max) and price per square foot
- Total units, floor count, unit type configurations
- Deposit structure and payment timeline
- Full amenity list
- Photo gallery and floor plans
- Developer information with link to profile
- FAQ section with project-specific Q&A
- Related projects in the same neighborhood

### Example Property Pages
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/properties/888-brickell-by-dolce-gabbana — 90-story ultra-luxury, $2.5M-$50M
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/properties/waldorf-astoria-residences-miami — 100-story branded residence, $1M-$50M
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/properties/cipriani-residences-miami — 80-story luxury branded, $1.1M-$20M
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/properties/st-regis-residences-brickell — 48-story ultra-luxury, $1.5M-$10M
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/properties/four-seasons-private-residences-coconut-grove — Boutique luxury, from $4M

---

## Neighborhood Pages (24 pages)

Each neighborhood page at `/new-condos-[neighborhood]` contains:
- Overview of the neighborhood and its real estate market
- Average pre-construction prices by unit type (studio, 1BR, 2BR, 3BR, penthouse)
- All active projects in that neighborhood
- Lifestyle and amenities description
- Dynamic FAQ about buying in that area
- Top developers active in the neighborhood
- Cross-links to all other neighborhoods

### Miami-Dade Neighborhoods
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-brickell — Financial district, 26+ projects
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-downtown-miami — Urban core, 15+ projects
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-edgewater — Bayfront enclave, 10+ projects
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-miami-beach — Barrier island, 14+ projects
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-coconut-grove — Village charm, 7+ projects
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-coral-gables — City Beautiful, 5+ projects
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-sunny-isles-beach — Oceanfront corridor
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-surfside — Boutique beach town
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-bal-harbour — Ultra-exclusive enclave
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-midtown-wynwood — Creative epicenter
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-aventura — Suburban luxury
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-key-biscayne — Island retreat

### Broward & Palm Beach
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-fort-lauderdale — Venice of America
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-hollywood — Broadwalk beachfront
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-hallandale-beach — County border value
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-pompano-beach — Emerging market
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-palm-beach — Ultra-exclusive island
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-boca-raton — Affluent suburban
- https://preconstructionmiami.net/new-condos-west-palm-beach — Urban renaissance

- **Content:** 78+ developer profiles with project portfolios
